card_description: Stone Poney is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick identifies "Astraea/Virgo" (Justice) as the entity that healed his blood pressure and promised judgment by fire for the despoilers of Earth (Vietnam)."

linked_segments.summary: Dick identifies "Astraea/Virgo" (Justice) as the entity that healed his blood pressure and promised judgment by fire for the despoilers of Earth (Vietnam). He reinterprets reality as a "Two-Player Gam
